scripts.check: pnpm prepare:sidecar && pnpm --filter @nectarpilot/desktop check && cargo check --workspace
scripts.lint: pnpm prepare:sidecar && pnpm --filter @nectarpilot/desktop lint && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: pnpm prepare:sidecar && pnpm --filter @nectarpilot/desktop test && cargo test --workspace
